banner.title: Enrollment Hub
banner.subtitle: Ready to join our community? Select your department to begin the enrollment process.

paths.title: Junior High School
paths.description: Start your JHS journey with our localized Blaan curriculum.

paths.title: Senior High School

schedule.title: Enrollment Schedule
schedule.description: Our physical enrollment desk is open Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Please ensure you have all required documents scanned for online forms or photocopied for campus visits.
